exercises.title: Lattice Surgery Simulator
tasks: Track logical qubit states through surgery
hints: Merge extends boundary stabilizers across gap
Apply Pauli corrections based on outcomes

exercises.title: CNOT via Surgery
exercises.description: Implement logical CNOT using lattice surgery.
tasks: Prepare control, target, and ancilla patches
Perform ZZ surgery between control and ancilla
Perform XX surgery between ancilla and target
hints: ZZ gives parity of control and ancilla
XX teleports X from ancilla to target
Corrections are Pauli gates on control/target

exercises.title: Magic State Injector
exercises.description: Implement T gate via magic state injection.
tasks: Verify T gate applied to input state
hints: Circuit: CNOT then measure magic state
One magic state per T gate

exercises.title: Resource Estimator
tasks: Count T gates in sample algorithms
hints: Factory needs ~15d² physical qubits per output
Time per T gate: O(d) code cycles
Higher d = lower error but more qubits
